new_jobs.title: Training Facilitator (Networking Trainer)
new_jobs.description:
About AWN
Following the Fourth World Conference on Women in Beijing, China, where Afghan women representing various organizations and United Nations agencies participated, the idea of establishing a unified platform for cooperation and coordination among Afghan women emerged. Inspired by global women’s movements and the need for collective action, these participants formally established the Afghan Women’s Network in 1995.
The Afghan Women’s Network (AWN) serves as a national platform that brings together women’s organizations and individual members to strengthen collaboration, promote shared learning, and support institutional development. It provides a structured space for organizations to enhance their capacities and contribute to community-based initiatives.
AWN maintains an active presence in multiple provinces, including Kabul, Herat, Balkh, Kandahar, Bamyan, Paktia, Nangarhar, Badakhshan and Kunduz, while also engaging members across other regions of Afghanistan. As an umbrella network, AWN works in coordination with its members to implement initiatives focused on community well-being, access to services, and capacity strengthening. The network comprises over 5,000 individual members and more than 150 member organizations.

Job Descriptions
Provide a clear understanding of networking concepts, definitions, and importance
Explain different types of networks (formal, informal, professional, community-based)
Introduce principles of effective communication within networks
Present relevant laws, policies, and regulations affecting women’s networks and civil society engagement
Train participants on interpersonal and professional communication skills
Teach strategies for building trust and maintaining relationships
Develop participants’ ability to communicate confidently in diverse settings
Develop participants’ ability to communicate confidently in diverse settings
Train participants on methods to attract new individual members and partner organizations
Provide tools for member engagement, retention, and participation
Support strategies for inclusive and diverse network expansion
Train participants on planning and conducting effective coordination meetings
Introduce meeting facilitation skills, agenda setting, and documentation
Strengthen follow-up and accountability mechanisms
Teach criteria and methods for investigating and analyzing networking needs
Guide participants in assessing the nature, scope, and effectiveness of networks
Introduce basic research tools (surveys, interviews, stakeholder mapping)
Train participants on effective communication through phone, email, and digital tools
Develop systems for information dissemination among network members
Promote clear, timely, and transparent communication practices
Train participants on how to engage with Network members, Civil society organizations, Government representatives (ministries, directors, advisors), Non-governmental organizations
Provide guidance on organizing and participating in meetings with key stakeholders
Teach strategies to establish and maintain strong working relationships with government and non-government organizations
Promote collaboration, mutual understanding, and long-term partnerships
Train participants on how to collect and analyze information to identify partnership opportunities
Support the development of alliances and coalitions for greater impact
Strengthen participants’ ability to advocate collectively for women’s rights and empowerment
Expected Outcomes
By the end of the training, participants will:
Understand key networking concepts and strategies
Communicate effectively within and outside their networks
Build and expand professional relationships
Organize and manage coordination meetings
Engage with stakeholders confidently
Develop partnerships, alliances, and coalitions to improve women’s lives

Job Requirements
Bachelor degree in social science preferably in Law, Islamic Studies, Business, Economics, Management or any other related field;
At least Three (3-5) years of relevant experience in delivering training on Networking and partnership development, Communication and interpersonal skills, organizational or capacity development, Advocacy or gender-based violence(GBV)
Experience working with Civil Society Organization (CSOs), Non-governmental organizations, (NGOs)Government institutions
Experience in women’s empowerment, gender equality, or community development programs is highly preferred
Excellent writing and communication and analytical skills;
Excellent written and verbal communication skills, with the ability to present complex information in a clear and concise manner;
Proficiency in drafting reports, press releases, and official correspondence;
Strong understanding of Networking concepts, types, strategies, Stakeholder engagement and relationship building, Coalition and alliance development,
Knowledge of laws, policies, and regulations affecting civil society and women’s networks
Familiarity with research methods, stakeholder mapping, and needs assessment
Ability to design training materials, tools, and methodologies
Ability to plan, organize, and manage training sessions effectively
Time management and ability to meet deadlines
Experience in organizing coordination meetings and workshops
Proficiency in spoken and written both English and local language/s is required.
Understanding and knowledge of basic computer applications such as MS Words, Excel and data base management;

Submission Guidelines
Applications received after the closing date will not be considered. · Please mention position title on the subject of email · Applications meeting the above requirement will be entertained only. · Only the short listed candidates will be notified. Contact Information Interested candidates, who meet the above-mentioned requirements, should submit an up-to-date Resume/CV, with a Letter of Interest, via email to the following e-mail address: vacancies@awn-af.org - Late applications won’t be considered.

Submission Email
vacancies@awn-af.org/admin.hrofficer@awn-af.org/ faisalahmad.22p@gmail.com/ lemashams10@gmail.com
Apply

details.Experience: At least Three (3-5) years of relevant experience in delivering training on Networking and partnership development, Communication and interpersonal skills, organizational or capacity development, Advocacy or gender-based violence(GBV)
details.Education: Bachelor degree in social science preferably in Law, Islamic Studies, Business, Economics, Management or any other related field;
details.Years of Experience: At least Three (3-5) years of relevant experience in delivering training on Networking and partnership development, Communication and interpersonal skills, organizational or capacity development, Advocacy or gender-based violence(GBV)

new_jobs.title: Electronic payment department مدیریت تادیات الکترونیکی
new_jobs.description:
Role Summary
گسترش کانال های الکترونیکی بانکی ، افزایش دسترسی مشتریان به خدمات بانکی ، اطمینان از امنیت سیستم ها و ترانزکشن ها ، ساده سازی استفاده از سیستم ها ، تحلیل و ارزیابی عملکرد کانال ها ، هماهنگی با تیم های تخنیکی ، پیشنهاد ابتکارات دیجیتلی جدید.

Duties and Responsibilities
رهبری و مدیریت تمامی فعالیت‌ های مرتبط با سیستم ‌ها و خدمات تادیات الکترونیکی.
تدوین پلان‌ های استراتیژیک و برنامه ‌های عملیاتی برای توسعه و بهبود سیستم‌ های پرداخت الکترونیکی.
کاهش هزینه‌ ها و افزایش درآمد از طریق مدیریت مؤثر کانال‌ های پرداخت.
برگزاری جلسات هماهنگی با تیم‌ های کاری و ارائه رهنمود های لازم جهت اجرای مؤثر امور.
ایجاد و توسعه کانال ‌های جدید پرداخت الکترونیکی و ارتقای خدمات موجود.
مطالعه مداوم بازار برای شناسایی فرصت ‌های جدید و جذب مشتریان بالقوه.
تدوین برنامه‌ های تجاری بر اساس تجزیه و تحلیل هزینه‌ ها و در آمد بالقوه هر کانال.
نظارت بر عملکرد کانال ‌ها و اطمینان از تحقق اهداف تعیین ‌شده.
نظارت کامل بر رعایت پالیسی‌ها، پروسیجرها و متحدالمال‌های بانک مرکزی.
ارزیابی الزامات امنیتی و اطمینان از انطباق کامل خدمات با معیارات امنیتی و تکنالوژیکی.
شناسایی روندهای نوین جهانی در بانکداری دیجیتال و انطباق آنها در ساحات کاری.
ثبت و رفع چالش‌ها و موانع در جریان نظارت و گزارش‌دهی به رهبری مربوطه.
هماهنگی دوامدار با بخش‌های APS، IT، CBS، Smart Vista، مارکیتنگ و سایر واحد های ذیربط.
تقویت روابط کاری مؤثر میان پشتنی بانک و بانک‌های عضو سیستم تادیات الکترونیکی د افغانستان بانک.
اشتراک فعال در جلسات و کمیته‌های مرتبط با سیستم‌های پرداخت در سطح بانک‌ها و نهادهای مرکزی.
پاسخ‌گویی به ایمیل‌ها و مکاتب رسمی دفتر APS، نمایندگی‌های ولایات و سایر مراجع.
هماهنگی برای رفع مشکلات تخنیکی مربوط به ماشین‌های ATM، سیستم‌های پرداخت و سایر ابزارهای الکترونیکی.
بررسی و کنترول تمامی حسابات GL مرتبط با ماشین‌های ATM در صورت ضرورت.
ارائه راه ‌حل‌ های فنی و مدیریتی برای مشکلات تخنیکی و عملیاتی.
ترتیب و تهیه اسناد رسمی، راپورهای عواید و فعالیت‌های روزمره در پایان هر ماه.
اطلاع‌رسانی منظم به آمر مستقیم در مورد پیشرفت‌ها، چالش‌ها و فعالیت‌های مهم.
همکاری و هماهنگی با تیم‌های تفتیش داخلی و خارجی.
انجام سروی ‌های منظم از بازار و شناسایی متقاضیان خدمات پرداخت الکترونیکی.
رسیده‌گی فوری به یافته‌ها و پیشنهادات تیم‌های نظارتی.
کار مستمر برای بهبود کیفیت خدمات و افزایش رضایت مشتریان.
اجرای سایر امور قانونی و وظایف توظیف‌ شده طبق هدایت آمر مستقیم.

Job Requirements
شرایط استخدام:
درجه تحصیل:
حد اقل لیسانس در رشته های اقتصاد،کمپیوتر ساینس. به رشته کمپیوتر ساینس ترجیح داده میشود. همچنان به درجه ماستر رشته های متذکره ارجحیت داده میشود.
تجربه کاری:
داشتن 3 سال تجربه در امور بانکی و مرتبط به وظیفه
مهارت های لازم:
بلدیت به لسان های رسمی کشور " پشتو و دری ". لسان خارجی ( حد اقل زبان انگلیسی )
توانایی در کار گروهی .
"بلدیت کامل در بخش انکشاف (digitalization) داد و ستد پولی (ATM Swiching and Settelement,Mobile Banking Platforms,Internet Banking,Card management system)
آشنایی به لسان انگلیسی و پروگرام های کمپیوتر.
لایحه وظایف خویش را بطور دقیق مطالعه نموده و با درنظرداشت آن اجراآت می نمایم.

Submission Guidelines
Interested candidates are requested to submit their application (CV with the Education Document and Tazkira Scan in one PDF format) to the Human Resources Department, Pashtany Bank.
To apply, please Click On Apply Now!
Only complete applications will be accepted, and short-listed candidates will be contacted to interview

new_jobs.title: Database Developer National Consultant
new_jobs.description:
About CTG
CTG was established in 2006, almost 20 years ago, in Afghanistan. We currently operate in 35 countries and have approximately 11,500 staff members committed to good!
But do you know who we are? And what do we do?
We provide tailored Human Resources and Staffing Solutions that support critical global initiatives across Humanitarian and Development sectors, and are now strategically foraying into new industries, including Construction, Energy, and IT, with a focus on high-risk regions.
Here’s a list of services we offer:
•Staffing solutions and HR management services
•Monitoring and evaluation
•Fleet management and logistics
•Facilities management
•Sustainability and Communications Advisory
•Election monitoring and observation
•IT professional services
•Medical assistance
Visit www.ctg.org to find out more.

Job Description
Background : The Afghanistan Food and Drug Authority (AFDA), as the national regulatory authority, is responsible for ensuring the quality, safety, and efficacy of medicines, medical devices, healthcare products, and food. Despite important progress, Afghanistan’s regulatory system continues to face challenges, including limited technical capacity, high dependence on imported products, inconsistent adherence to quality standards, and evolving systems for product registration, inspections, licensing, and market surveillance. Strengthening AFDA’s regulatory functions in alignment with WHO norms and standards is essential to protect public health, prevent substandard and falsified products, and support the country’s broader goals for health system resilience and universal health coverage.
To advance these priorities, AFDA is implementing regulatory reforms guided by the WHO Global Benchmarking Tool (GBT), which provides a structured framework for assessing regulatory maturity and developing Institutional Development Plans (IDPs). To accelerate progress, specialized technical support is required to strengthen GBT implementation, enhance capacity in GMP, regulatory workflows, medicines registration, regulatory information systems, and AMR-related oversight. The engagement of an international consultant will provide targeted expertise, hands-on mentoring, and capacity-building to AFDA staff, supporting the development of sustainable, evidence-based, and internationally aligned regulatory systems that effectively safeguard public health in Afghanistan.

Job Requirements
1. Purpose of the Consultancy:
The purpose of this post is to design, develop, and maintain high-quality databases to meet AFDA requirements. The incumbent ensures seamless integration between backend and frontend systems, delivers secure and maintainable code, and contributes to the overall efficiency and scalability of AFDA’s digital services.
2. Output:
The outputs of this post include scalable and secure web applications that provide reliable backend services and responsive frontend interfaces. The role ensures enhanced user experience, efficient database integration, and high application performance. By maintaining best practices and documentation, it supports future scalability, sustainable software maintenance, and the successful delivery of digital services.
3. Tasks:
· Design, develop, and maintain scalable web applications using Django (backend) and React + TypeScript (frontend).
· Build and optimize RESTful APIs and integrate with PostgreSQL databases.
· Implement clean, maintainable, and secure code following best practices.
· Collaborate with designers, product managers, and other developers to deliver high-quality features.
· Troubleshoot, debug, and optimize application performance and write and maintain technical documentation
Deliverables:
Deliverable 1: Fully functional databases and Clean, maintainable, and secure code adhering to best practices.
Deliverable 2: Technical documentation covering system architecture, workflows, and APIs.
Deliverable 3: Optimized application performance, troubleshooting, and debugging reports.
Qualifications and experience:
Education :
Essential: Bachelor’s degree in computer science, Information Technology, Software Engineering, or a related field. A Master’s degree is preferred and may be considered an asset.
Experience :
Essential: A minimum of 2 years of progressively responsible experience in database development, design, and Django, react.nexjs at a specialist level.
Skills / Technical skills and knowledge:
• Excellent interpersonal and communication skills.
• High sense of responsibility and strong organizational skills with ability to work under pressure.
• Advanced computer literacy (Word, Excel, PowerPoint, etc.)
Languages :
• Excellent knowledge of English
• Good Local Languages (Pashto and Dari)
Additional Information
WHO has zero tolerance for sexual misconduct, inaction against it and any form of retaliation against victims/survivors or bystanders who disclose, report, or participate in an investigation. Parallel to technical competence, recruitment, selection and hiring decisions will give due emphasis to assessing candidates value congruence, thorough background checks and reference check processes. This will ensure children and vulnerable adults are safeguarded from abusers and that abusers are prevented from joining WHO Afghanistan office. Please report any concerning information regarding sexual exploitation and abuse by WHO workforce and partners to WHO office of Internal Oversight services at investigations@who.int
WHO is a smoke free environment.

Submission Guideline
Click on the link below and then click on ‘Register and Apply’ if you are not already registered with CTG.
Follow the steps to provide your details and register;
Provide the information marked in red.
Save your profile and upload copies of your qualification and CV.
Once your profile is created and saved go to Vacancies tab on the right corner.
Click on the vacancy that you want to apply for.
Provide your current employment details, date that you are available from and salary expectations.
Tick the boxes and click submit.
You will see your application under the Application tab
Tayo (tayohr.io)

Submission Email
https://app.tayohr.io/jobs/detail/vac-54752-database-developer-national-consultant-53471

details.Experience: A minimum of 2 years of progressively responsible experience in database development, design, and Django, react.nexjs at a specialist level.
details.Contract Duration: 3 months, renewable subject to the requirements of the position, availability of funds, and satisfactory performance of the individual
details.Education: Bachelor’s degree in computer science, Information Technology, Software Engineering, or a related field. A Master’s degree is preferred and may be considered an asset.
details.Years of Experience: A minimum of 2 years of progressively responsible experience in database development, design, and Django, react.nexjs at a specialist level.

new_jobs.title: IT Manager
new_jobs.description:
About HPL
Honest Public Ltd (HPL) is a group of companies, specializing in providing exceptional management services throughout Afghanistan. With over 1500+ staff throughout the country, we specialize in Supply, Logistics, Security, Customer Care, Consultancy, and Construction services.
At HPL, our top priority is delivering reliable and efficient services that meet the unique needs of our clients.
Our dedicated team of professionals works closely with clients to provide customized solutions that ensure maximum satisfaction.
We take pride in our ability to provide timely and dependable services to our clients, and we are committed to upholding the highest standards of quality and professionalism. Our services are designed to help businesses and organizations in Afghanistan operate effectively, safely, and efficiently.

Job Description
Running regular checks on network and data security
Identifying and acting on opportunities to improve and update software and systems
Developing and implementing IT policy and best practice guides for the organization
Designing training programs and workshops for staff
Conducting regular system audits
Running and sharing regular operation system reports with senior staff
Overseeing and determining timeframes for major IT projects including system updates, upgrades, migrations and outages
Managing and reporting on allocation of IT budget
Providing direction for IT team members
Identifying opportunities for team training and skills advancemen
Any other tasks assigned by supervisor.

Job Requirements
Education : Minimum Bachelor degree in Computer Science or Information Technology, higher will be an advantage
Experience : Minimum 7 year of relevant experience in Information Technology
Experience in project management will be considered as asset.
Excellent Technical knowledge of network and PC hardware
Excellent trouble shooting knowledge.
Extensive experience in reporting and knowledge of major donor rules
Languages: Proficiency in both national languages and Excellent communication skills in English is required.
Excellent Conflict Management and people management skills
The incumbent must be Punctual, reliable and have strong communication skill
Self-Motivated, Quick learner with a positive attitude

Submission Guideline
To apply for the position, please follow these steps:
Open the link: HPL JOB APPLICATION FORM
Important Notes:
Please ensure that your current address and the specific job location you are applying for are clearly included in both your CV and application form .
Applications missing this information will not be accepted .
Applications received after the closing date will not be considered.
Only shortlisted applicants will be contacted.
If you encounter any issues during the application process, please contact us at 0202201261 or email hr@hpl.af. (Please note: This email is not for CV submissions.)
Please Note that:
HPL commits to a fair and transparent recruitment procedure.
HPL will conduct its recruitment based on need only.
Only the HR department will contact you during the recruitment process.
Only short-listed candidates whose application responds to the criteria will be contacted & local applicants from the same province are encouraged to apply and will be given priority.
HPL is not responsible for any job announcements made on other websites or social media platforms. Only information shared through official channels will be considered valid.
HPL does not charge any fees at any stage of the recruitment process. Applying for a vacancy is completely free of charge .

Submission Email
visit this website (jobs.hpl.af) or click the link above "HPL JOB APPLICATION FORM"

details.Contract Duration: one Year (with possible extension based on performance)
details.Education: Minimum Bachelor degree higher will be an advantage

expiring_today.title: MSupply/Data entry assistant
expiring_today.description:
About MHCO
Maihan Humanitarian Convergence Organization (MHCO) is a national non-government, non-political, and non-profit organization registered with the Ministry of Economy, committed to delivering humanitarian services across Afghanistan. MHCO focuses on various sectors including Health, Education, Protection, Nutrition, Livelihoods, Food Security, and Organizational Development.

Job Description
he MSupply/Data Entry Assistant supports the pharmacy department by ensuring accurate and timely entry of stock data into the mSupply system, maintaining proper inventory records, and assisting with reporting, stock monitoring, and documentation. The role contributes to efficient pharmaceutical supply management and ensures compliance with organizational procedures.
Duties and Responsibilities:
Accurately enter and update pharmaceutical data in the mSupply system , including stock receipts, issues, adjustments, and transfers.
Maintain up-to-date records of medicines and medical supplies in both physical and electronic systems.
Verify and cross-check data with stock cards, bin cards, and delivery notes to ensure accuracy.
Monitor stock levels and report low stock, expiries, and discrepancies to the supervisor.
Assist in preparing stock reports, consumption reports, and inventory summaries on a regular basis.
Ensure proper documentation and filing of all pharmacy records, including invoices, waybills, and stock reports.
Support the pharmacy team during stock counts, physical inventory, and audits.
Maintain confidentiality and integrity of all data entered into the system.
Coordinate with warehouse and pharmacy staff to ensure timely data entry of all transactions.
Identify and report any inconsistencies or errors in the system promptly.
Assist in ensuring compliance with organizational policies and donor requirements related to pharmacy and inventory management.
Perform any other related tasks assigned by the supervisor.

Job Requirements
Bachelor’s degree in Pharmacy, Health Sciences, Computer Science , Business Administration, or a related field.
At least 2 –3 years of relevant experience in data entry, pharmacy, or supply chain/warehouse management.
Familiarity with mSupply system or other inventory management software is preferred.
Good knowledge of pharmaceutical products and stock management practices.
Strong data entry skills with high attention to accuracy and detail.
Proficiency in MS Office (Excel, Word) .
Ability to maintain organized records and documentation.
Good communication and coordination skills.
Ability to work under pressure and meet deadlines.
Understanding of basic reporting and documentation procedures.
Knowledge of English and local languages (Dari/Pashto) is required.
Strong sense of integrity, confidentiality, and accountability.
Safeguarding and Recruitment Statement – MHCO
At MHCO, we are firmly committed to maintaining a safe, respectful, and inclusive working environment. We do not tolerate any form of inappropriate behaviour, including sexual harassment, exploitation, abuse, or financial misconduct. The safety and well-being of children, young people, adults, and all beneficiaries we engage with are of paramount importance.
All MHCO staff are expected to uphold these principles in accordance with our Code of Conduct and safeguarding policies. We place strong emphasis on recruiting individuals who demonstrate integrity and align with our organizational values.
The selected candidate for this role will receive comprehensive safeguarding training and will be responsible for understanding and adhering to MHCO’s safeguarding standards. Employment offers are subject to satisfactory references and relevant screening checks, which may include criminal background verification and terrorism finance assessments.
we will request information from previous employers regarding any substantiated findings of sexual exploitation, abuse, or harassment, as well as any ongoing investigations at the time of the candidate’s departure.
By submitting an application, candidates confirm their understanding and acceptance of these recruitment procedures .

Submission Guideline
The interested candidate should submit their complete application (CV/Cover letter) through the link provided below.
Note: Only short-listed candidates will be contacted for written Test/Interview
https://forms.gle/LAH3auLQapGN9BuW8

Submission Email
https://forms.gle/LAH3auLQapGN9BuW8

expiring_soon.title: Chief Information Officer
expiring_soon.description: Role Summary The Chief Information Officer (CIO) is a senior executive responsible for leading the bank’s overall information technology (IT) strategy and operations. The CIO ensures that technology systems support the bank’s strategic goals, enhance operational efficiency, and comply with regulatory requirements. This role involves overseeing IT infrastructure, digital banking systems, cybersecurity frameworks, and data management practices. The CIO plays a critical role in driving digital transformation, improving customer experience through technology, and ensuring the security and integrity of all banking systems. The CIO collaborates with executive management and other departments to identify technological needs, implement innovative solutions, and manage IT risks. Additionally, the role ensures business continuity, system reliability, and alignment of IT initiatives with the bank’s long-term objectives. Duties and Responsibilities Chief Information Officer shall develop goals, roadmap and executing a multi-year technology strategy supporting the full range of business services, and ensure the IT department runs smoothly and effectively. Chief Information Officer shall provide vision and leadership for developing and implementing information technology initiatives and Chief Information Officer is a member of the Executive Leadership Team and directs the planning and implementation of enterprise IT systems in support of business operations in order to improve cost effectiveness and service quality, Chief Information Officer shall direct activities of the IT Department, providing leadership and supervising of IT staff and ensures Compliance with bank’s policies and procedures as well monitor changes in the technology sector to discover ways the company can improve and develop. Chief Information Officer is responsible for daily operations of technology and technology-related systems and in providing ongoing service to internal staff and other stakeholders, also responsible for all aspects of the organization’s information technology and systems, including information and cybersecurity. Chief Information Officer Shall Lead IT strategic and operational planning to achieve business goals by fostering innovation, prioritizing IT initiatives, and coordinating the evaluation, deployment and management of current and future IT resources and systems across the organization. Chief Information Officer Shall Create state of the organization dynamic security practices across the IT department and bank as well provide high quality day-to-day operations of technology and technology enabled business functions. Chief Information Officer shall develop and maintain an appropriate IT organizational structure that supports the organization’s needs, including information and cybersecurity. Chief Information Officer shall stay abreast of emerging technologies that can improve IT department performance and bring cost effectiveness to the company. Chief Information Officer responsible to stay at the forefront of IT risk and security issues facing the Bank also Assess and make recommendations on the improvement or re-engineering of the IT department. Chief Information Officer shall maintain security standards appropriate for the bank’s size and complexity and Develop, track, and control the IT annual operating and capital budgets. Chief Information Officer shall collaborate with senior leaders to ensure technology strategy and investment are in line with business function objectives and Acting as a senior point of escalation to troubleshoot, report and resolve issues as well supervise the networks and computer systems including Core Banking applications and Databases in the company to ensure optimal performance. Chief Information Officer shall serve as the senior technical solutions analyst and ensuring strategic technology decisions are evaluated and assessed in line with technology industry standards. Chief Information Officer shall identify security threats, formulate strategies and methods to mitigate the threats. Chief Information Officer Shall Plan, Direct and establish IT-related projects as well create and adapt technological platforms to improve the customer experience. Chief Information Officer is responsible for Troubleshoot date-related issues and establish regular maintenance. Chief Information Officer shall work with upper-level IT staff to develop and implement department goals and implementing IT policies, protocols and standards. Chief Information officer shall Develops and implement strategies to improve the efficiency and efficacy of technologies initiatives appropriate support to company-wide goals. Chief Information Officer is responsible to review performance of IT staff and develop their Job Descriptions. Chief Information Officer is Responsible for the development, review and certification of all back-up and disaster recovery procedures and plans as well planning data storage and monitoring performance of databases. Chief Information officer shall Train IT staff personnel to enhance their skills and knowledge. Chief Information officer shall monitor and regular check-up of IT succession plan and develop succession plan for key IT positions. Chief Information Officer shall work with upper management and senior IT staff to develop the IT department budget as well review and recommend IT department purchases and payments. Chief Information officer shall Review Vendor proposals and makes decisions based on things such as price, what they offer, and how the vendor product may fit into the organization. Chief Information officer shall communicate with other executives regarding costs, value and risk-potential of new IT projects. Chief Information Officer Shall Oversees the development and testing of new programs developed specifically for the company. Chief Information Officer Shall Ensures the company’s data remains secure by keeping up to date on the latest cyber security threats and finds ways to guard against them on an organization-wide scale. Chief Information officer shall Coaches members of the IT teams, particularly IT leaders, so everyone stays on the same pate across the company. Chief Information officer shall Communicates with other executive members to make sure all parts of the company use technology in the best ways possible. To attend to any other matter that may not have been mentioned in this document but is otherwise required to be attended by the job holder. Besides, the Job Holder is to attend to any Bank related assignment given by CEO, Board of Supervisors or General Meeting of Share Holders. Job Requirements Education: Bachelor’s degree in Computer Science required; Master’s degree preferred. Professional Certificates in cybersecurity, information Technology, and modern threats. Experience: Minimum 7-10 Year experience in managing or directing IT operation in financial institutions. Skills: Proven experience as chief information officer or similar managerial role. Excellent knowledge of IT systems and infrastructure. Background in designing/developing IT systems and planning implementation. Solid understanding of data analysis, budgeting and business operations. Superior analytical and problem-solving capabilities. Strong strategic and business mindset. Excellent organizational and leadership skills. Outstanding communication and interpersonal abilities. Personal Attributes: Visionary thinker Perseverance Patience Risk Taking Ability Outgoing Personality Service-oriented skills Leadership Skills: Supervisory skills Motivational skills Ability to take ownership Delegation of work Entrepreneurial skills Staff Management Skills Decision-Making Skills Submission Guidelines Please mention specific Job Title and Vacancy numbers in subject line of your E-mail otherwise your application will not be considered. Applicants who meet the above requirements should submit their updated Curriculum vitae (CV) to email address ( sr.recruitment-officer@ghazanfarbank.com ) Applicants while applying for this position must take in CC entire Email address of ( info.bsd@dab.gov.af ) otherwise the applications will not be considered. Applications received after the deadline will not be considered. Only shortlisted candidates will be contacted for further process.

tech_banking_jobs.title: Chief Information Officer
tech_banking_jobs.description: Role Summary The Chief Information Officer (CIO) is a senior executive responsible for leading the bank’s overall information technology (IT) strategy and operations. The CIO ensures that technology systems support the bank’s strategic goals, enhance operational efficiency, and comply with regulatory requirements. This role involves overseeing IT infrastructure, digital banking systems, cybersecurity frameworks, and data management practices. The CIO plays a critical role in driving digital transformation, improving customer experience through technology, and ensuring the security and integrity of all banking systems. The CIO collaborates with executive management and other departments to identify technological needs, implement innovative solutions, and manage IT risks. Additionally, the role ensures business continuity, system reliability, and alignment of IT initiatives with the bank’s long-term objectives. Duties and Responsibilities Chief Information Officer shall develop goals, roadmap and executing a multi-year technology strategy supporting the full range of business services, and ensure the IT department runs smoothly and effectively. Chief Information Officer shall provide vision and leadership for developing and implementing information technology initiatives and Chief Information Officer is a member of the Executive Leadership Team and directs the planning and implementation of enterprise IT systems in support of business operations in order to improve cost effectiveness and service quality, Chief Information Officer shall direct activities of the IT Department, providing leadership and supervising of IT staff and ensures Compliance with bank’s policies and procedures as well monitor changes in the technology sector to discover ways the company can improve and develop. Chief Information Officer is responsible for daily operations of technology and technology-related systems and in providing ongoing service to internal staff and other stakeholders, also responsible for all aspects of the organization’s information technology and systems, including information and cybersecurity. Chief Information Officer Shall Lead IT strategic and operational planning to achieve business goals by fostering innovation, prioritizing IT initiatives, and coordinating the evaluation, deployment and management of current and future IT resources and systems across the organization. Chief Information Officer Shall Create state of the organization dynamic security practices across the IT department and bank as well provide high quality day-to-day operations of technology and technology enabled business functions. Chief Information Officer shall develop and maintain an appropriate IT organizational structure that supports the organization’s needs, including information and cybersecurity. Chief Information Officer shall stay abreast of emerging technologies that can improve IT department performance and bring cost effectiveness to the company. Chief Information Officer responsible to stay at the forefront of IT risk and security issues facing the Bank also Assess and make recommendations on the improvement or re-engineering of the IT department. Chief Information Officer shall maintain security standards appropriate for the bank’s size and complexity and Develop, track, and control the IT annual operating and capital budgets. Chief Information Officer shall collaborate with senior leaders to ensure technology strategy and investment are in line with business function objectives and Acting as a senior point of escalation to troubleshoot, report and resolve issues as well supervise the networks and computer systems including Core Banking applications and Databases in the company to ensure optimal performance. Chief Information Officer shall serve as the senior technical solutions analyst and ensuring strategic technology decisions are evaluated and assessed in line with technology industry standards. Chief Information Officer shall identify security threats, formulate strategies and methods to mitigate the threats. Chief Information Officer Shall Plan, Direct and establish IT-related projects as well create and adapt technological platforms to improve the customer experience. Chief Information Officer is responsible for Troubleshoot date-related issues and establish regular maintenance. Chief Information Officer shall work with upper-level IT staff to develop and implement department goals and implementing IT policies, protocols and standards. Chief Information officer shall Develops and implement strategies to improve the efficiency and efficacy of technologies initiatives appropriate support to company-wide goals. Chief Information Officer is responsible to review performance of IT staff and develop their Job Descriptions. Chief Information Officer is Responsible for the development, review and certification of all back-up and disaster recovery procedures and plans as well planning data storage and monitoring performance of databases. Chief Information officer shall Train IT staff personnel to enhance their skills and knowledge. Chief Information officer shall monitor and regular check-up of IT succession plan and develop succession plan for key IT positions. Chief Information Officer shall work with upper management and senior IT staff to develop the IT department budget as well review and recommend IT department purchases and payments. Chief Information officer shall Review Vendor proposals and makes decisions based on things such as price, what they offer, and how the vendor product may fit into the organization. Chief Information officer shall communicate with other executives regarding costs, value and risk-potential of new IT projects. Chief Information Officer Shall Oversees the development and testing of new programs developed specifically for the company. Chief Information Officer Shall Ensures the company’s data remains secure by keeping up to date on the latest cyber security threats and finds ways to guard against them on an organization-wide scale. Chief Information officer shall Coaches members of the IT teams, particularly IT leaders, so everyone stays on the same pate across the company. Chief Information officer shall Communicates with other executive members to make sure all parts of the company use technology in the best ways possible. To attend to any other matter that may not have been mentioned in this document but is otherwise required to be attended by the job holder. Besides, the Job Holder is to attend to any Bank related assignment given by CEO, Board of Supervisors or General Meeting of Share Holders. Job Requirements Education: Bachelor’s degree in Computer Science required; Master’s degree preferred. Professional Certificates in cybersecurity, information Technology, and modern threats. Experience: Minimum 7-10 Year experience in managing or directing IT operation in financial institutions. Skills: Proven experience as chief information officer or similar managerial role. Excellent knowledge of IT systems and infrastructure. Background in designing/developing IT systems and planning implementation. Solid understanding of data analysis, budgeting and business operations. Superior analytical and problem-solving capabilities. Strong strategic and business mindset. Excellent organizational and leadership skills. Outstanding communication and interpersonal abilities. Personal Attributes: Visionary thinker Perseverance Patience Risk Taking Ability Outgoing Personality Service-oriented skills Leadership Skills: Supervisory skills Motivational skills Ability to take ownership Delegation of work Entrepreneurial skills Staff Management Skills Decision-Making Skills Submission Guidelines Please mention specific Job Title and Vacancy numbers in subject line of your E-mail otherwise your application will not be considered. Applicants who meet the above requirements should submit their updated Curriculum vitae (CV) to email address ( sr.recruitment-officer@ghazanfarbank.com ) Applicants while applying for this position must take in CC entire Email address of ( info.bsd@dab.gov.af ) otherwise the applications will not be considered. Applications received after the deadline will not be considered. Only shortlisted candidates will be contacted for further process.

tech_banking_jobs.title: Senior Accountant Or Finance Officer
tech_banking_jobs.description:
About Rahat IT Solutions
Rahat IT Solutions is a growing company providing IT, Ecommerce and logistic services and business solutions, focused on efficiency, transparency, and scalable systems.

Job Description
Rahat IT Solutions is seeking a skilled and reliable Senior Accountant / Finance Officer to manage financial operations. The candidate will be responsible for maintaining accurate financial records, handling transactions, and supporting business decision-making.
Key Responsibilities:
Manage daily accounting and bookkeeping activities
Prepare financial reports (daily, weekly, monthly, quarterly, yearly)
Handle accounts payable and receivable
Maintain accurate financial records using Excel, Google sheets or accounting systems
Monitor cash flow and expenses
Ensure compliance with financial procedures
Support management with financial insights

Job Requirements
Bachelor’s degree in Accounting, Finance, or related field
Minimum 2–3 years of experience in accounting
Strong skills in Microsoft Excel (important)
Good understanding of financial reporting
High attention to detail and accuracy
Ability to work independently
Good communication skills
Candidate should be based in Kabul
Fluent in Pashto, Dari and English

Submission Guideline
Interested candidates should send their CV via:
WhatsApp: +93 79 048 5571
Email: noorullah.developer@gmail.com
Only shortlisted candidates will be contacted.

Submission Email
noorullah.developer@gmail.com

details.Education: Bachelor in accounting, finance or related fields
